title: Candle's Consistency - Compats, Crutches, and Changes
description: 'Fixes' to the game, and some mods that are forgotten.
body:
A 1.20.1 Forge support mod with 45+ fixes across a plethora of mods. Every change is toggleable and only appear if supported mods are installed. This mod adds missing tags, compatibilities between mods, and random bug fixes.

### Bug Fixes
- Tetracelium - Fix Botania mana regen items not mending to full durability.
- Forge Skyboxes - Fix resource reloading on startup.
- Respiteful - Fix fluid registration breaking recipe display with JEI, particularly with Create mechanical craft recipes.
- Dawn of Time - Fix missing vegetation not being compostable.

### Compatibilities
- Accessories + Simple Hats - Allows use of Simple Hats when using Accessories mod.
- Accessories + Skill Cloaks - Allows capes and hoods to be worn in Accessories slots.
- Simple Hats + Supplementaries - Allows Simple Hat's hats to be placed on Supplementaries Hat Stand.
- Alex's Mobs + Neapolitan - Recipe compatibilty between like items.
- Quark + Project Vibrant Journeys - PVJ hollow logs will drop as their Quark counterparts when broken, preserving the aesthetic of PVJ.
- Twigs + Project Vibrant Journeys - PVJ twigs and rocks will drop as their Twigs counterpart.
- Traveler's Backpack + Others - Adds a lot of missing tools, Create's Wrench, Botania Wands, Exposure's camera, etc... to the list of tools accepted by the backpack tool quick slot.

### Game Changes
- Adds a check for a stone type block above when spawning Glow Squid to encourage spawning in caves as opposed to deep oceans.
- Adds the 'belt' tag to lanterns when Accessories is installed.
- Tetra Ruins spawn in mountainous biomes in addition to 'cold' ones.

### Tag Fixes
- Create mod recipes use Forge tags where appropriate, ie. 'forge:workbench' is accepted for a Mechanical Crafter instead of a Vanilla Workbench only.
- Unification of various mod's 'rope' items, Beautify, Supplementaries, Farmer's Delights, etc...
- Added missing 'stripped log/wood' tag to modded wood types.
- And more

This mod's purpose is to serve as the glue for my own mod pack, support for other loaders/versions is unlikely.
